assumptions.detail: No analysis.json found (stage 00 not run). Used Next.js App Router as specified explicitly in PRD, Cloud Run for hosting, Firebase Auth with Google sign-in.
Tasks sorted by dueDate ascending. Tasks without a future due date appear first. This is the most natural sort for a task list.
'Overdue' defined as: status is not 'done' AND dueDate is strictly before today (not including today). Tasks due today are not considered overdue.
Task description is optional (not required by the form). Title and due date are required.
Dashboard shows 4 stat cards: To Do count, In Progress count, Done count, and Overdue count. Overdue card has red accent when overdue count > 0.
Filter and task list use Firestore real-time listener (onSnapshot) so tasks update live across tabs without refresh.
Composite Firestore indexes created for: (userId ASC, dueDate ASC) and (userId ASC, status ASC, dueDate ASC) on the 'tasks' collection in the task-tracker-test database.
shadcn/ui installed with base-ui backend (not Radix). DropdownMenuTrigger does not support asChild; styled directly with className instead.
